tasks.goal: Replace the main data-question route with a thin MCP passthrough route.
requirements: Do not call LLM-generated MCP args on the main route.
Do not call QuerySpec generation, repair, validation, or fallback on the main route.
Require an explicit frontend-selected datasource/datasource_luid; do not infer datasource.
If an MCP natural-language query tool is not available, return MCP_NL_TOOL_UNAVAILABLE.
Do not construct query-datasource fields from the natural-language question.
acceptance: Tests prove Q1-Q4-like questions do not emit llm_queryspec, llm_mcp_args, or queryspec fallback events.
Tests prove missing MCP NL tool returns MCP_NL_TOOL_UNAVAILABLE.

tasks.goal: Add minimal support for discovering and invoking a Tableau MCP natural-language query tool if one exists.
requirements: Discover MCP tools by tools/list or existing client capability if already present.
Select only an explicit configured/allowlisted natural-language query tool name.
Pass original user question and selected datasource identifier without rewriting.
If only structured query-datasource exists, report no NL tool available.
Do not add business terms or field mappings.
acceptance: Unit tests cover NL tool available and unavailable branches.
No business query planning appears in the client.

tasks.goal: Keep only response_data normalization and renderer restatement behavior.
requirements: Renderer input must treat MCP response_data as the only fact source.
Do not calculate, derive, add, remove, or rewrite business fields.
DCE must not mutate primary response_data.
Structured MCP errors must be surfaced without query fallback.
acceptance: Tests prove renderer cannot calculate missing metrics.
Tests prove DCE shadow, if present, does not modify primary response_data.

tasks.goal: Run live Q1-Q4 verification after implementation.
requirements: Use the current Tableau MCP server tool list as evidence.
Run Q1-Q4 through Mulan on current code.
Record whether each run used an MCP NL tool or returned MCP_NL_TOOL_UNAVAILABLE.
Confirm no QuerySpec/LLM MCP args events appear.
acceptance: Live artifact is written under inbox.
Validation summary states pass/fail for Q1-Q4 under the contracted boundary.
